name: Fresh Fig Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter or coat a 9-inch springform pan with nonstick cooking spray and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat sugar and butter together until well mixed using an electric mixer on medium speed.
4. Add yogurt and eggs to the mixture and continue beating until blended.
5. Reduce the mixer speed to low and gradually add flour, baking powder, and cinnamon.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Trim the stem end off each fig and cut each fig lengthwise in half.
8. Arrange the figs around the rim of the pan with their cut surfaces and skin sides up on top of the batter.
9. Place the remaining figs in the center of the cake batter.
10. Bake for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
11. Allow the cake to cool in the pan on a wire rack until it reaches lukewarm temperature.
12. Loosen the sides of the pan from the cake and carefully remove the pan rim.
13. Transfer the cake to a serving plate and serve warm.
